style: Cinematic sci-fi aesthetic, high-end 3D render with filmic post-processing. Teal and warm amber complementary color grade. Rich deep shadows. Film grain at 5%. Volumetric haze. Side key light with soft fill. One piercing electric blue accent on the hero subject. Wet reflective surfaces. Micro-detail: particles, dust motes catching light. Shallow depth of field. CRITICAL: Do NOT include any text, letters, words, or numbers in the image.
scenes: A single banana glowing with faint radioactive energy on a dark laboratory countertop, Geiger counter nearby with needle flickering
Extreme close-up of a neutron star fragment the size of a teaspoon, impossibly dense, warping light around it, sitting on a precision scale showing impossible numbers
DNA double helix unraveling and stretching into deep space, Earth visible below, Pluto far in the distance, the strand connecting them
Cross-section of a human stomach with acid dissolving a piece of stainless steel, the stomach lining visibly regenerating around it
A person eating a plain bagel while subtle alcohol molecule visualizations float around their digestive system, dreamlike quality
Underwater waterfall at the Denmark Strait, massive columns of cold dense water plunging 11500 feet into an abyss, bioluminescent particles in the current
